title: sphaerostigma andinum
intro: Sphaerostigma andinum, also known as Lemon Myrtle or Lemon Ironwood, is a small evergreen tree native to Australia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Sphaerostigma andinum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory issues, and providing a natural source of antioxidants. The herbal preparations of Sphaerostigma andinum include tea, essential oil, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
